---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or integration
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like Blind Assistant to do?
*Describe the feature in plain language — what task would become possible?*

## Who does this help?
*Which blind users would benefit most from this? Describe their situation.*

## Is there anything that does this today?
*Are there existing tools that do this (even if inaccessibly)? What's missing?*

## How important is this to you?
- [ ] **Critical** — I can't use the app without this
- [ ] **High** — This would significantly improve my daily life
- [ ] **Medium** — Nice to have
- [ ] **Low** — Future enhancement

## Would you be willing to help build it?
- [ ] Yes — I can write code
- [ ] Yes — I can test it
- [ ] Yes — I can document it
- [ ] No, but I can answer questions about the use case
